source_jobs.title: Senior Accountant
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT TRADEIFY

Tradeify is a fast growing, fully remote proprietary trading firm with a team of 130+ people across 26+ countries. Our brands include Tradeify and Slay Markets (Tradeify Brokerage). As we scale, we are adding entities, payment channels, and financial complexity, and we are building out a dedicated in-house accounting function to support it. This is a foundational hire with real ownership and a clear path to grow with the company.




ABOUT THE ROLE

We are hiring our first dedicated in-house Senior Accountant to own day to day accounting operations and, over time, help build and lead our accounting function. You will work closely with our CFO/COO, FP&A team, and external accounting partners in a high volume, multi-channel payment environment. If you want to put your stamp on how a finance function is built rather than inherit someone else's, this role is for you.




WHAT YOU WILL DO

 - Own the monthly, quarterly, and year end close process and drive it to predictable, on time completion

 - Reconcile complex, high volume payment flows including merchant processing fees, chargebacks, refunds, Rise account activity, PayPal activity, and affiliate payouts

 - Maintain the general ledger across multiple legal entities and ensure intercompany activity is accurate and eliminated correctly

 - Prepare and review journal entries, accruals, and account reconciliations

 - Produce accurate financial statements in accordance with US GAAP

 - Build and document scalable accounting processes and internal controls as the company adds entities, transactions, and complexity

 - Partner with FP&A on budgeting, forecasting, and variance analysis

 - Support external accountants and auditors and serve as a key internal point of contact

 - Help evaluate, implement, and improve accounting systems and automation

 - As the function grows, help hire, mentor, and lead the accounting team




WHAT YOU BRING

 - 5+ years of progressive accounting experience, including full cycle month end close ownership

 - Bachelor's degree in Accounting, Finance, or a related field

 - Strong working knowledge of US GAAP and internal controls

 - Hands on experience reconciling high volume transactions across multiple payment processors

 - Multi entity accounting experience

 - Advanced Excel and Google Sheets skills

 - Experience with cloud accounting or ERP systems (QuickBooks, NetSuite, or similar)

 - Strong analytical skills, attention to detail, and a high degree of ownership

 - Comfort operating with autonomy in a fast moving, fully remote environment




NICE TO HAVE

 - CPA or active CPA candidate

 - Fintech, payments, brokerage, trading, or broader financial services experience

 - Digital asset or crypto accounting exposure

 - Experience standing up or scaling an accounting function at a high growth company

 - Familiarity with payout platforms and affiliate or partner payment models




WHY JOIN TRADEIFY

 - Join a professional-grade futures trading firm at a pivotal stage of growth

 - Work with and learn from experienced traders across multiple asset classes

 - High-performance culture that rewards ownership, curiosity, and results

 - Access to premium market data tools, exchange infrastructure, and industry resources

 - Competitive base salary, performance bonuses, and comprehensive benefits

 - Be a foundational member of the accounting operations at a growing fintech company




A NOTE ON OUR HIRING PROCESS

At Tradeify Futures, we use AI-assisted tools as part of our recruiting process, which may include resume screening, application review, and candidate communication. We want all applicants to be aware of this upfront so you can make an informed decision about applying. Final hiring decisions are always made by a member of our team.

source_jobs.title: Trader Support Specialist - Futures
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT TRADEIFY

At Tradeify, we are not just another proprietary trading firm. We are a dynamic and innovative fintech and prop trading platform specializing in multi-asset trading through sophisticated, data-driven strategies and cutting-edge technology. We partner with industry leaders like NinjaTrader and Tradovate to provide our traders with a best-in-class experience.



Our mission is to empower exceptional traders by providing significant capital, state-of-the-art technology, and unwavering support, enabling them to thrive in the complexities of global financial markets.



We are deeply rooted in a culture of quantitative analysis, rigorous risk management, and continuous learning. As we continue our aggressive growth trajectory, we are seeking talented Trader Support Specialists to support our traders and customers during our evening coverage window.




THE OPPORTUNITY

Tradeify is hiring a Trader Support Specialist to serve as a primary point of contact for our traders and customers. In this role, you will own trader interactions from start to resolution across support channels including live chat, email, and Discord.



This is a high-touch support role that requires strong communication skills, technical curiosity, empathy, and the ability to troubleshoot issues in a fast-paced trading environment. You will help traders navigate account questions, platform issues, operational inquiries, and general Tradeify support needs while ensuring every interaction feels complete, clear, and professional.



Schedule: This role will work 3:00 PM to 11:00 PM EST.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Serve as the primary point of contact for Tradeify traders and customers, owning interactions from start to resolution through live chat, email, Discord, and other support channels.

 - Accurately identify, assess, and resolve a wide range of inquiries, including general account questions, technical issues, trading platform questions, data feed concerns, and operational support needs.

 - Develop a strong understanding of Tradeify’s trading platforms, internal tools, proprietary systems, and trader workflows.

 - Troubleshoot incoming inquiries, determine urgency and severity, and escalate to the appropriate internal teams such as Compliance, Operations, and Technology when needed.

 - Provide white-glove trader support by combining product knowledge, empathy, and strong follow-through.

 - Educate current and prospective traders on how Tradeify works, including account processes, platform functionality, rules, and trader expectations.

 - Contribute to Tradeify’s trader-facing Learning Center and internal knowledge bases to improve self-service resources and team efficiency.

 - Support team goals related to customer satisfaction, quality assurance, response times, and resolution quality.

 - Monitor trading systems and common support trends to proactively identify issues that may impact the trader experience or operational flow.

 - Participate in beta testing for new features and provide feedback that supports product improvement and company growth.

 - Adhere to internal guidelines, compliance procedures, and industry best practices to help maintain a secure, transparent, and trustworthy trading environment.

 - Assist with data accuracy, reconciliation, or operational support tasks as needed.




WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

 - 2+ years of experience in customer service, technical support, operations, or a similar role, preferably in a fast-paced environment.

 - Excellent written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to explain technical or financial information clearly, concisely, and empathetically.

 - Ability to type a minimum of 30 WPM.

 - A customer-first mindset with a strong focus on delivering thoughtful, complete, and high-quality support.

 - Ability to multitask, prioritize competing needs, and manage time effectively in a dynamic environment.

 - Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with the ability to diagnose

source_jobs.title: Tradeify TV Content Coordinator
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT TRADEIFY

Tradeify is a fast-growing proprietary trading firm and fintech platform empowering traders with capital, cutting-edge tools, and a high-performance ecosystem. We serve a global community of traders across futures and crypto through elite technology, education, and media.



As we continue scaling our media presence, Tradeify TV plays a key role in educating, engaging, and growing our audience through livestreams, podcasts, market content, and trader-focused entertainment.




ROLE SUMMARY

We are hiring a Tradeify TV Content Coordinator to support the day-to-day execution of our content engine. This role is ideal for someone highly organized, detail-oriented, and passionate about digital media growth.



You will act as a key support partner to the production and content team, helping ensure videos, livestream clips, podcasts, and social content are published accurately, optimized for performance, and delivered on schedule.



This is a strong fit for someone with experience as a Production Assistant, Content Coordinator, YouTube Operations Specialist, or Media Operations Associate.




WHAT YOU WILL DO


CONTENT PUBLISHING & DISTRIBUTION

 - Upload and publish content across YouTube, podcast, and social platforms

 - Schedule videos, livestream replays, shorts, and clips according to the content calendar

 - Ensure all assets are properly formatted, tagged, and published on time

 - Coordinate final handoff between editors, producers, and marketing teams


METADATA & OPTIMIZATION

 - Write and optimize titles, descriptions, tags, timestamps, and captions

 - Support thumbnail testing and title experimentation to improve CTR

 - Maintain SEO best practices across YouTube and search-based content

 - Ensure branding consistency across all uploads


CALENDAR & WORKFLOW MANAGEMENT

 - Own and maintain the Tradeify TV publishing calendar

 - Track deadlines, deliverables, and upcoming launches

 - Help organize content inventory including raw footage, finished assets, and backlog opportunities

 - Communicate priorities clearly with editors, producers, and stakeholders


PERFORMANCE & A/B TESTING

 - Run and track A/B tests for thumbnails, titles, upload timing, and packaging

 - Monitor key metrics including CTR, retention, watch time, impressions, and subscriber growth

 - Share simple weekly performance recaps and recommendations

 - Help identify repeatable content patterns that drive growth


PRODUCTION SUPPORT

 - Assist with livestream operations, guest scheduling, notes, prep sheets, and run-of-show documents

 - Support podcast and media production workflows when needed

 - Help troubleshoot last-minute publishing or scheduling issues

 - Track on stream giveaways




WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR


MUST HAVE

 - 1+ years experience in content operations, media coordination, production assistant, or digital publishing roles

 - Strong organization skills with excellent attention to detail

 - Familiarity with YouTube Studio and content publishing workflows

 - Understanding of thumbnails, titles, metadata, and audience growth strategy

 - Ability to manage multiple deadlines in a fast-paced environment

 - Strong communication skills and ownership mindset


NICE TO HAVE

 - Experience with finance, trading, sports, or creator-led media brands

 - Familiarity with tools like YouTube Studio, Canva, Adobe Premiere Pro, Notion, or Asana

 - Experience with YouTube analytics or thumbnail testing tools

 - Understanding of creator economy trends and audience behavior




WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE

 - Content goes live consistently and on time

 - Stronger click-through rates through better titles/thumbnails

 - Organized and reliable publishing calendar

 - Faster turnaround between production and release

 - Improved content performance through disciplined testing




WHY JOIN TRADEIFY

 - Be part of a high-growth fintech/media brand

 - Help shape one of the most exciting trader media platforms in the space

 - Join a

source_jobs.title: Full Stack Engineer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT TRADEIFY

At Tradeify, we are building a high-performance trading ecosystem that empowers traders around the world with capital, technology, education, and community. We operate across futures and crypto markets and partner with platforms like NinjaTrader and Tradovate to deliver a best-in-class trading experience.



As we continue scaling rapidly, technology sits at the center of everything we do. We are looking for a talented Full Stack Engineer who thrives in fast-paced environments and enjoys building products end-to-end across both frontend and backend systems.




THE OPPORTUNITY

We are hiring a Full Stack Engineer to help design, build, and scale applications across the Tradeify ecosystem. This role is ideal for someone who enjoys owning features from concept to deployment and is equally comfortable working on backend architecture, APIs, databases, and modern frontend experiences.



You will work closely with Product, Design, Data, and Engineering teams to deliver performant, scalable, and user-friendly products that directly impact traders globally.



This is a hands-on role for someone who enjoys moving quickly, solving complex problems, and contributing across the entire stack.




WHAT YOU WILL DO


FRONTEND DEVELOPMENT

 - Build responsive, high-performance web applications and user interfaces

 - Collaborate with Product and Design teams to create intuitive user experiences

 - Develop reusable frontend components and scalable UI systems

 - Optimize applications for speed, usability, and accessibility

 - Implement real-time dashboards, analytics views, and trading-related interfaces


BACKEND DEVELOPMENT

 - Design and develop scalable APIs and backend services

 - Build and maintain microservices and distributed systems

 - Work with databases, caching layers, and event-driven architectures

 - Develop integrations with third-party platforms, trading systems, and internal tools

 - Ensure system reliability, security, and performance across environments


ENGINEERING & COLLABORATION

 - Participate in architecture discussions and technical planning

 - Write clean, maintainable, and well-tested code

 - Contribute to CI/CD pipelines and deployment processes

 - Troubleshoot production issues and improve system observability

 - Collaborate cross-functionally with engineering, product, operations, and leadership teams

 - Help shape engineering standards, tooling, and best practices as the company scales




WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR

 - 4+ years of software engineering experience in full-stack development

 - Strong experience with modern frontend frameworks such as React, Next.js, or Vue

 - Strong backend development experience using technologies such as Python, Node.js, C#, or Go

 - Experience building and consuming REST APIs and WebSocket services

 - Solid understanding of databases such as PostgreSQL, MySQL, Redis, or MongoDB

 - Experience working with cloud infrastructure and containerized environments

 - Familiarity with Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD pipelines, and distributed systems

 - Ability to work independently in a fast-paced, startup-style environment

 - Strong communication and collaboration skills

 - Passion for building products with strong performance and user experience




NICE TO HAVE

 - Experience within fintech, trading, crypto, or financial systems

 - Exposure to real-time systems or market data applications

 - Experience with event streaming systems such as Kafka, NATS, or Pulsar

 - Understanding of analytics, experimentation, or growth-focused product development

 - Experience with TimescaleDB, ClickHouse, or high-volume data systems

 - Familiarity with AI-assisted development workflows and engineering automation




WHY JOIN TRADEIFY

 - Join a rapidly scaling fintech and trading platform

 - Work on products used by a global community of traders

 - High ownership and ability to make direct impact

 - Fully remote environment with a fast-moving startup culture

 - O

source_jobs.title: Editor & Graphics Producer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT TRADEIFY FUTURES

Tradeify Futures is a fast-growing proprietary trading and technology firm specialising in futures markets. We build cutting-edge tools and infrastructure that empower traders to perform at their best. Our culture is rooted in ambition, accountability, and collaboration — we move fast, think boldly, and win together.



ABOUT THE ROLE

We are looking for a talented and versatile Editor & Graphics Producer to join the Tradeify Futures team on a full-time, remote basis. In this role, you will own the end-to-end creation of video content and motion graphics that bring our brand, products, and trading insights to life across all markets. You are an exceptional editor with a sharp eye for design, a strong grasp of visual storytelling, and the ability to work autonomously across multiple projects in a fast-paced environment.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Edit and produce high-quality video content across social, digital, and marketing formats — from short-form clips to long-form explainers and brand films

 - Create motion graphics, animated titles, lower thirds, and visual assets that align with Tradeify Futures brand guidelines

 - Collaborate with the marketing, trading, and content teams to translate briefs into compelling visual content

 - Manage your own project pipeline from brief through delivery, meeting deadlines across multiple simultaneous projects

 - Adapt and localise content for our audiences, accounting for regional tone, language, and cultural nuances

 - Maintain and evolve Tradeify Futures' visual identity across all produced content

 - Source and manage music, sound design, voiceover, and licensed footage as needed

 - Contribute ideas to content strategy and help shape the visual direction of campaigns

 - Archive and organise all project assets and media libraries



REQUIREMENTS

 - 2-4 years of experience in video editing and motion graphics production, ideally within fintech, trading, media, or a creative agency

 - Expert-level proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro and Adobe After Effects

 - Strong motion graphics skills with the ability to design and animate from scratch

 - Demonstrable portfolio of edited video content and motion graphics work across digital and social formats

 - Proven ability to manage multiple projects independently, meeting tight deadlines without compromising quality

 - Strong understanding of visual storytelling, pacing, and brand-consistent design

 - Excellent communication skills; comfortable working remotely and collaborating across time zones



NICE TO HAVE

 - Experience producing content for financial services, trading platforms, or fintech brands

 - Proficiency in Adobe Photoshop, Illustrator, or Figma for static asset creation

 - Experience with web design and basic front-end concepts (HTML/CSS); familiarity with tools such as Webflow, WordPress, or similar platforms is a plus

 - Experience with 3D animation tools (e.g. Cinema 4D, Blender)

 - Familiarity with social-first content formats (Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts)

 - Experience with colour grading and audio mixing

 - Background in live streaming or broadcast production



WHY JOIN US

 - Work on high-impact creative projects at the intersection of trading and technology

 - Tight-knit, driven team that genuinely supports each other

 - Real ownership and creative influence from day one



A Note on Our Hiring Process

At Tradeify Futures, we use AI-assisted tools as part of our recruiting process, which may include resume screening, application review, and candidate communication. We want all applicants to be aware of this upfront so you can make an informed decision about applying. Final hiring decisions are always made by a member of our team.

source_jobs.title: Part-Time Producer (APAC)
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT TRADEIFY FUTURES

Tradeify Futures is a fast-growing proprietary trading and technology firm specialising in futures markets. We build cutting-edge tools and infrastructure that empower traders to perform at their best. Our culture is rooted in ambition, accountability, and collaboration — we move fast, think boldly, and win together.



ABOUT THE ROLE

We are looking for a motivated and organized Producer to support our growing APAC production function on a part-time basis. In this role, you will manage the day-to-day delivery of creative and operational projects across the region, working closely with internal teams and external partners to bring work to life on time, on budget, and to the highest standard.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Own end-to-end production of projects from brief through delivery, ensuring quality and timeliness

 - Coordinate with trading, operations, and creative teams across multiple APAC time zones

 - Manage project schedules, resource allocation, and vendor relationships for APAC-based work

 - Track budgets, raise purchase orders, and reconcile actuals against estimates

 - Liaise with local partners, studios, and suppliers across key APAC markets

 - Maintain production documentation including schedules, call sheets, and status logs

 - Identify and flag risks early, proposing solutions to keep projects on track

 - Support senior team members on larger-scale productions as required



REQUIREMENTS

 - 3–5 years of production experience in a trading firm, fintech, creative agency, or in-house studio

 - Strong understanding of production workflows across digital, video, and/or content formats

 - Demonstrated experience managing projects across APAC markets and time zones

 - Excellent organizational skills with the ability to juggle multiple projects simultaneously

 - Clear, confident communicator with vendors, stakeholders, and internal teams

 - Proficiency with project management tools (e.g. Monday.com http://Monday.com, Asana, or similar)

 - Comfortable working independently in a part-time, remote capacity



NICE TO HAVE

 - Experience in a trading, fintech, or financial services environment

 - Familiarity with post-production or digital content pipelines

 - Background in integrated or multi-market campaigns

 - Experience working with global brand or institutional clients

 - Knowledge of local regulatory and compliance requirements across APAC markets



WORKING HOURS

This is a part-time position. Core hours align with APAC business hours. Schedule is 20 hours a week.



WHY JOIN US

 - Work on high-impact projects at the intersection of trading and technology

 - Tight-knit, driven team that genuinely supports each other

 - Competitive part-time compensation

 - Real ownership and visibility from day one



A Note on Our Hiring Process

At Tradeify Futures, we use AI-assisted tools as part of our recruiting process, which may include resume screening, application review, and candidate communication. We want all applicants to be aware of this upfront so you can make an informed decision about applying. Final hiring decisions are always made by a member of our team.

source_jobs.title: Part-Time Editor & Live Stream Producer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT TRADEIFY FUTURES

Tradeify Futures is a professional-grade futures trading platform providing access to commodities, equity indices, currencies, and interest rate products. We equip traders with the execution tools, market data, and infrastructure they need to perform at the highest level — whether they are independent retail participants or institutional desks.



We are building a world-class team that combines deep market knowledge, analytical rigor, and a genuine passion for performance. If futures markets excite you, you will feel right at home here.




THE OPPORTUNITY



THIS ROLE IS OPEN TO REMOTE CANDIDATES ACROSS THE EMEA REGION AND IS APPROXIMATELY 20 HOURS A WEEK



Tradeify Futures is seeking a Part-Time Editor & Live Stream to support the creation, production, and distribution of content across Tradeify TV and social media channels. This role will primarily focus on editing high-performing short-form content from livestreams, market commentary, interviews, and educational programming while also supporting live broadcasts using OBS.

The ideal candidate is a creative storyteller who understands how to capture attention through short-form video while also being comfortable managing production elements behind the scenes. This is an excellent opportunity for someone looking to grow their skills in digital media, livestream production, and financial content.




WHAT YOU WILL DO

Video Editing & Content Creation

 - Edit long-form livestreams, interviews, webinars, and educational content into engaging short-form videos

 - Create content for TikTok, Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts, X, LinkedIn, and other social media platforms

 - Identify compelling moments, market insights, and educational clips that can be repurposed into short-form content

 - Add captions, graphics, transitions, motion elements, and branding to enhance engagement and retention

 - Optimize content for platform-specific formats and audience behavior

 - Maintain organized media libraries and project files

Live Stream Production

 - Produce and support live broadcasts using OBS Studio

 - Manage scenes, overlays, transitions, audio sources, and stream layouts

 - Monitor livestream quality and troubleshoot technical issues during broadcasts

 - Prepare production assets, graphics, and visual elements before going live

 - Record and organize livestream content for post-production editing

Content Operations & Collaboration

 - Collaborate with hosts, traders, and internal stakeholders to execute content plans and production schedules

 - Support content calendars and publishing workflows

 - Assist in developing new content formats and audience engagement initiatives

 - Stay current on social media trends, editing techniques, and livestream best practices

 - Contribute creative ideas to help grow the Tradeify TV brand and community




WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR

 - High school diploma, associate degree, bachelor's degree, or equivalent practical experience

 - Experience editing short-form content for social media platforms

 - Proficiency with Adobe Premiere Pro, CapCut, DaVinci Resolve, Final Cut Pro, or similar editing software

 - Working knowledge of OBS Studio and livestream production workflows

 - Strong understanding of social media content trends and audience engagement strategies

 - Excellent organizational skills and attention to detail

 - Ability to manage multiple projects and deadlines in a fast-paced environment

 - Strong communication skills and a collaborative mindset

 - Self-starter with a willingness to learn and take ownership

 - 1–3 years of experience in video editing, content production, digital media, or a related field




NICE TO HAVE

 - Experience producing livestreams, podcasts, webinars, or creator content

 - Motion graphics experience using Adobe After Effects or similar tools

 - Experience editing content within fintech, trading, gaming, sports, or educational media

 - Familiarity with YouTube, TikTo

source_jobs.title: Senior Front-End Engineer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT TRADEIFY

At Tradeify, we are building a high-performance trading ecosystem that empowers traders around the world with capital, technology, education, and community. We operate across futures and crypto markets and partner with platforms like NinjaTrader and Tradovate to deliver a best-in-class trading experience.



As we continue scaling rapidly, technology sits at the center of everything we do. We are looking for a talented Front-End Engineer who thrives in fast-paced environments and enjoys crafting polished, high-performance interfaces that traders rely on every day.




THE OPPORTUNITY

We are hiring a Front-End Engineer to design, build, and scale the user-facing side of the Tradeify ecosystem. This role is ideal for someone who cares deeply about performance, design fidelity, and developer experience — and who can translate complex trading workflows into clean, intuitive interfaces.



You will work closely with Product, Design, Data, and Engineering teams to deliver experiences that directly impact traders globally. This is a hands-on role based out of our Boca Raton, FL office.




WHAT YOU WILL DO


UI ENGINEERING

 - Build responsive, high-performance web applications using modern frontend frameworks

 - Translate designs into pixel-accurate, accessible, and performant UI components

 - Develop and maintain a scalable design system and component library

 - Implement real-time dashboards, data visualizations, and trading-related interfaces

 - Optimize for Core Web Vitals, rendering performance, and cross-browser compatibility




STATE & DATA MANAGEMENT

 - Architect client-side state management for complex, data-intensive applications

 - Integrate with REST APIs and WebSocket streams for real-time market data

 - Build efficient data-fetching layers with caching, polling, and streaming support

 - Handle high-frequency UI updates with minimal performance overhead




ENGINEERING & COLLABORATION

 - Partner with Design to refine UX flows and maintain consistency across the product

 - Write clean, well-tested, and maintainable component code

 - Contribute to frontend tooling, build systems, and CI/CD pipelines

 - Participate in code reviews and help define frontend engineering standards

 - Troubleshoot performance and rendering issues in production




WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR

 - 6+ years of experience in frontend or UI engineering

 - Expert-level proficiency in React and TypeScript

 - Strong understanding of Next.js or similar SSR/SSG frameworks

 - Experience building real-time or data-dense interfaces (dashboards, charts, tables)

 - Deep understanding of browser rendering, CSS architecture, and web performance optimization

 - Familiarity with state management libraries such as Zustand, Redux, or Jotai

 - Experience integrating WebSocket or streaming APIs on the frontend

 - Solid understanding of accessibility standards (WCAG) and responsive design

 - Ability to work independently and move quickly in a startup environment

 - Strong communication and collaboration skills




NICE TO HAVE

 - Experience within fintech, trading, crypto, or financial data products

 - Familiarity with charting libraries such as TradingView, D3.js, Recharts, or ECharts

 - Exposure to real-time market data feeds or order book visualizations

 - Experience building or maintaining design systems and component libraries

 - Knowledge of animation and micro-interaction libraries (Framer Motion, GSAP)

 - Familiarity with testing frameworks such as Vitest, Jest, Playwright, or Cypress

 - Experience with AI-assisted development workflows and engineering automation




WHY JOIN TRADEIFY

 - Join a rapidly scaling fintech and trading platform

 - Work on products used by a global community of traders

 - High ownership and ability to make direct impact

 - Hybrid environment in Boca Raton, FL with a fast-moving startup culture

 - Opportunity to work across the full frontend stack — UI systems, data visualization, and re

source_jobs.title: Backend Engineer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT TRADEIFY

At Tradeify, we are building a high-performance trading ecosystem that empowers traders around the world with capital, technology, education, and community. We operate across futures and crypto markets and partner with platforms like NinjaTrader and Tradovate to deliver a best-in-class trading experience.



As we continue scaling rapidly, technology sits at the center of everything we do. We are looking for a talented Backend Engineer who thrives in building the systems, services, and infrastructure that power a high-performance trading platform.




THE OPPORTUNITY

We are hiring a Backend Engineer to design, build, and scale the core services and infrastructure behind the Tradeify ecosystem. This role is ideal for someone who enjoys working deep in distributed systems, event-driven architectures, and high-throughput APIs — and who takes ownership of reliability and performance at scale.



You will work closely with Product, Data, and Engineering teams to deliver robust backend systems that directly power the experience of traders globally. This is a hands-on role based out of our Boca Raton, FL office.




WHAT YOU WILL DO


API & SERVICE DEVELOPMENT

 - Design and build performant, scalable REST APIs and WebSocket services

 - Develop and maintain backend microservices using Python, Node.js, Go, or C#

 - Own features end-to-end from schema design through deployment and monitoring

 - Build integrations with third-party trading platforms, market data providers, and internal tools




DATA & INFRASTRUCTURE

 - Design and optimize relational and NoSQL data models across PostgreSQL, MySQL, Redis, and MongoDB

 - Build and maintain event-driven pipelines and message queue systems

 - Work with cloud infrastructure (AWS, GCP, or Azure) and containerized deployments

 - Manage caching strategies, background job processing, and async workflows




RELIABILITY & ENGINEERING EXCELLENCE

 - Ensure system reliability, security, and performance across all environments

 - Implement observability — logging, metrics, alerting, and distributed tracing

 - Contribute to CI/CD pipelines, infrastructure-as-code, and deployment automation

 - Participate in architecture discussions and technical planning sessions

 - Write clean, well-tested, and maintainable backend code

 - Troubleshoot production incidents and drive root cause resolution




WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR

 - 4+ years of backend software engineering experience

 - Strong proficiency in one or more backend languages: Python, Node.js, Go, or C#

 - Deep experience designing and building scalable REST APIs and WebSocket services

 - Solid understanding of relational databases (PostgreSQL, MySQL) and query optimization

 - Experience with caching layers (Redis, Memcached) and async processing patterns

 - Familiarity with message brokers and event streaming (Kafka, RabbitMQ, NATS, or similar)

 - Experience working with cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, or Azure) and Docker/Kubernetes

 - Strong grasp of system design principles — distributed systems, fault tolerance, and scalability

 - Ability to work independently and move quickly in a startup environment

 - Strong communication and collaboration skills




NICE TO HAVE

 - Experience within fintech, trading, crypto, or financial systems

 - Exposure to real-time systems or market data applications (order books, tick data, trade execution)

 - Experience with high-volume or time-series data systems such as TimescaleDB or ClickHouse

 - Familiarity with infrastructure-as-code tools (Terraform, Pulumi)

 - Experience with gRPC or other binary protocols for low-latency service communication

 - Background in building compliance, risk, or audit trail systems

 - Familiarity with AI-assisted development workflows and engineering automation




WHY JOIN TRADEIFY

 - Join a rapidly scaling fintech and trading platform

 - Work on products used by a global community of traders

 - High ownership and ability to make direct impa

source_jobs.title: VP of Business Development
source_jobs.description:
ROLE OVERVIEW

We are seeking a visionary, high-velocity VP of Business Development to architect and execute our global growth strategy. This is not a traditional business development role; it is a high-impact, strategic position designed for a future Chief Revenue Officer (CRO).

In this role, you will own the revenue-generation engine across three critical pillars: scaling a world-class affiliate ecosystem, forging high-value strategic partnerships, and leading our playbook for international country expansion. You will directly impact the company’s top and bottom lines, working closely with executive leadership to transition our market footprint from regional success to global dominance.




KEY RESPONSIBILITIES


1. STRATEGIC PARTNERSHIPS & ALLIANCES

 - Identify, negotiate, and close complex, high-impact commercial partnerships with enterprise players, ecosystems, and platforms to unlock new revenue streams.

 - Build a repeatable partnership framework and lifecycle management process to ensure long-term, mutually beneficial relationship health and maximum monetization.

 - Collaborate with Product and Engineering teams to integrate partner technologies that enhance our core value proposition.


2. AFFILIATE PROGRAM EXCELLENCE

 - Design and scale a high-performing global affiliate and referral network, optimizing commission structures, tracking, and attribution models.

 - Recruit top-tier global affiliates, networks, and media publishers to drive sustainable, low-CAC user acquisition.

 - Leverage data analytics to continuously optimize affiliate performance, fraud prevention, and ROI.


3. GLOBAL COUNTRY EXPANSION

 - Own the international expansion playbook, conducting rigorous market analysis, regulatory assessments, and localized competitive mapping.

 - Establish localized strategic relationships to fast-track market penetration and brand credibility.


4. REVENUE LEADERSHIP & CRO TRAJECTORY

 - Align BD activities directly with enterprise revenue goals, taking ownership of P&L targets for partnerships and new markets.

 - Build, mentor, and scale a world-class, data-driven Business Development and Partnership team.

 - Implement rigorous sales ops, CRM hygiene, and forecasting models to provide predictable pipeline visibility to the executive board.




WHO YOU ARE & WHAT YOU BRING

 - Experience: 8–12+ years of progressive experience in Business Development, Partnerships, or Sales Leadership, preferably within a fast-growing B2B/B2C SaaS, Fintech, or Marketplace environment.

 - Expansion Track Record: Proven experience successfully launching products or services into new international markets, navigating localized nuances.

 - Affiliate Mastery: Deep understanding of affiliate marketing platforms, performance marketing dynamics, and managing multi-million dollar affiliate networks.

 - The "CRO Mindset": You don't just look at "deals signed"—you look at revenue realized. You are highly analytical, metrics-driven, and possess strong financial acumen (P&L management, LTV/CAC ratios, cohort analysis).

 - Dealmaking Polish: Exceptional negotiation skills with a track record of closing 7-figure, complex enterprise deals.

 - Leadership: Experience hiring, managing, and inspiring distributed, international teams.




WHY THIS ROLE IS UNIQUE (THE CRO PATH)

This position is explicitly structured for a leader aiming for the C-suite. As you successfully demonstrate the ability to tie partnerships, affiliates, and expansion into a cohesive, high-growth revenue engine, you will be given direct visibility and mentorship to transition into the Chief Revenue Officer (CRO) role, taking over holistic ownership of Sales, Marketing, and Customer Success.

source_jobs.title: Fraud Analyst
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT TRADEIFY FUTURES

Tradeify Futures is a professional-grade futures trading platform providing access to commodities, equity indices, currencies, and interest rate products. We equip traders with the execution tools, market data, and infrastructure they need to perform at the highest level — whether they are independent retail participants or institutional desks.

We are building a world-class team that combines deep market knowledge, analytical rigor, and a genuine passion for performance. If futures markets excite you, you will feel right at home here.




THE OPPORTUNITY

Tradeify is looking for a Fraud Analyst to protect the integrity of our funded trading programs. You will own the day-to-day detection, investigation, and resolution of fraudulent and abusive trading behavior — from account takeovers and identity fraud to evaluation gaming, collusion, and payout abuse. This role is critical to the business: it directly protects the capital we allocate to traders and the trust that legitimate traders place in our platform.

This is an excellent opportunity for someone with hands-on prop firm or funded-trading experience who wants to apply that domain knowledge to building and running a modern fraud program.




WHAT YOU WILL DO


DETECTION & INVESTIGATION

 - Monitor accounts, evaluations, and payout requests for fraud typologies specific to funded trading, including multiple/duplicate account creation, evaluation-passing services, account handoffs, copy trading, cross-account hedging, and coordinated abuse rings

 - Investigate flagged accounts end-to-end: review trade history, device and session data, KYC/identity documentation, and payment information to reach a documented conclusion

 - Analyze transaction and trading patterns to proactively surface new or emerging fraud trends before they scale

 - Tune and calibrate fraud detection rules and thresholds, run small-scale tests, and document new typologies as they are identified


PROCESS, REPORTING & COLLABORATION

 - Partner with Risk, Payments, Customer Support, and Engineering to close gaps that enable repeat fraud and to implement system or policy improvements

 - Prepare clear, well-documented case files and escalate complex or high-dollar cases with a recommended course of action

 - Run post-incident reviews and maintain fraud typology and audit trail documentation

 - Communicate calmly and professionally with traders during disputes, account reviews, and payout holds




WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR

 - Bachelor's degree in finance, business, criminal justice, or a related field, or equivalent hands-on experience

 - Previous experience at a proprietary trading firm, funded trading platform, or futures/derivatives brokerage — you understand how evaluations, funded accounts, and payouts work

 - 1–3+ years of experience in fraud, risk, or trust & safety analysis, ideally within fintech, trading, or payments

 - Strong pattern recognition skills and comfort digging through large volumes of trade, account, and transaction data

 - Proficiency with Excel/Google Sheets and SQL or similar tools for querying and analyzing data

 - Clear written communication and meticulous case documentation habits

 - Sound judgment and composure when handling sensitive disputes and high-stakes decisions




NICE TO HAVE

 - Certified Fraud Examiner (CFE) or similar certification

 - Familiarity with device intelligence, identity verification, or fraud case management tooling

 - Experience with futures, forex, or CFD trading products specifically

 - Exposure to chargeback / payment dispute handling in a fintech environment




WHY JOIN TRADEIFY FUTURES

 - Join a professional-grade futures trading firm at a pivotal stage of growth

 - Work with and learn from experienced traders across multiple asset classes

 - High-performance culture that rewards ownership, curiosity, and results

 - Access to premium market data tools, exchange infrastructure, and industry resources

 - Competi

notes: Tradeify is a fintech and prop trading platform with a mix of tech and non-tech roles. The company has a strong focus on technology and is scaling rapidly.
